flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hawkeye Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hawkeye Community College rose 61% between 2006 and 2009 (27.4% → 44.2%).
